name: Fixed rate—Leg 1
description: The value of the per annum rate of the fixed rate of leg 1.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI where the reported UPI is of a product with a fixed rate, and for other products, if applicable (Paragraph 380).
Required if Asset class is INTR, Contract type is SWAP and the UPI is for a fixed-fixed product (Paragraph 384(a)(i)).
Required if Asset class is INTR, Contract type is SWAP and the UPI is for an FRA (Paragraph 384(a)(ii)).
May be optionally reported in any other case if Asset class is not CURR (Paragraph 384(a)(iii)).
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO (Paragraph 380).
valueRules: Always reported as a decimal of any numeric value (positive, negative or zero) (Paragraph 379).
